ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrency_prices" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date for which the price data is recorded */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* The day of the week corresponding to the date */,
  "currency_pair" TEXT /* The pair of cryptocurrency and fiat currency (e.g., BNB/CAD) */,
  "price" REAL /* The closing price for the cryptocurrency in the fiat currency */,
  "change" REAL /* The change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* The percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume" REAL /* The volume of trades for the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* The market capitalization of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* The highest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* The lowest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* The opening price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* The closing price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the price data (e.g., Binance, Coinbase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "currency_pair")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* The consensus algorithm used by the cryptocurrency (e.g., Proof of Work, Proof of Stake) */,
  "block_time" REAL /* The average time to mine a new block */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* The total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* The circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* The official website of the cryptocurrency project */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* The URL to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiat_currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiat currency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the fiat currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the fiat currency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country that issues the fiat currency */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* The annual inflation rate of the fiat currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* The exchange rate of the fiat currency against a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* The first name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* The last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* The URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "currency_pair" TEXT /* The cryptocurrency/fiat currency pair for the alert */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* The price threshold for the alert */,
  "threshold_percentage" REAL /* The percentage change threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* The date the alert was set up */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert (e.g., price, volume, market cap) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* A description or message for the alert */,
  "triggered_time" TEXT /* The time when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_currency_pair FOREIGN KEY ("currency_pair") REFERENCES fiat_currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_currency_pair FOREIGN KEY ("currency_pair") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the cryptocurrency traded in the last 24 hours */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "trading_pairs" TEXT /* List of trading pairs involving the cryptocurrency */,
  "24h_change" REAL /* The percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "7d_change" REAL /* The percentage change in price over the last 7 days */,
  "30d_change" REAL /* The percentage change in price over the last 30 days */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* The volume of trades over the last 24 hours */,
  "market_cap_rank" INTEGER /* The rank of the cryptocurrency by market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency related to the news */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL to the full news article */,
  "is_breaking" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the news is breaking */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the news (e.g., market, technology, regulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Preferred type of data visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the user wants to receive alerts */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the preferences were last updated */,
  "preferred_currencies" TEXT /* A list of preferred cryptocurrencies for the user */,
  "preferred_fiat" TEXT /* A list of preferred fiat currencies for the user */,
  "preferred_time_zone" TEXT /* The user's preferred time zone */,
  "language" TEXT /* The user's preferred language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
